A few kind words might have prevented the rebellion of Rehoboam's subjects; but all the power of his kingdom cannot bring them back. It is useless to argue with God’s purpose when it is made known to us. Even those who lack true faith will sometimes pay attention to the word of God and be kept from wrong actions, to which they are naturally inclined.

When the priests and Levites came to Jerusalem, the devoted Israelites followed them. Those who set their hearts to seek the Lord God of Israel left the inheritance of their fathers and went to Jerusalem so that they could have free access to the altar of God and avoid temptation to worship the calves. What is best for our souls is what is best for us; in all our choices, religious advantages should be sought before any external comforts. Where God’s faithful priests are, his faithful people should be. When it has been shown that we are willing to give up our worldly interests as far as we are called to do so for the sake of Christ and his gospel, we have good evidence that we are truly his disciples. It is in a nation's interest to protect religion and religious people.
